testcase.name: test_login_returns_token

failure.message: AssertionError: Login response should contain access_token assert 'access_token' in {'email': 'newtestuser@test.com', 'name': 'Test User', 'session_token': 'sess_40686150712942c2b7688cf6018dcf53', 'user_id': 'user_2a20fc0ff9c2'}

testcase.failure: tests/test_full_regression.py:41: in test_login_returns_token assert "access_token" in data, "Login response should contain access_token" E AssertionError: Login response should contain access_token E assert 'access_token' in {'email': 'newtestuser@test.com', 'name': 'Test User', 'session_token': 'sess_40686150712942c2b7688cf6018dcf53', 'user_id': 'user_2a20fc0ff9c2'}

testcase.name: test_me_endpoint
testcase.failure: tests/test_full_regression.py:59: in test_me_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_direct_capitalization

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('indicated_value' in {'cap_rate': '0.065', 'collection_loss': '7100.00', 'egi': '330150.00', 'expense_breakdown': None, ...} or 'value' in {'cap_rate': '0.065', 'collection_loss': '7100.00', 'egi': '330150.00', 'expense_breakdown': None, ...})

testcase.failure: tests/test_full_regression.py:322: in test_direct_capitalization assert "indicated_value" in data or "value" in data E AssertionError: assert ('indicated_value' in {'cap_rate': '0.065', 'collection_loss': '7100.00', 'egi': '330150.00', 'expense_breakdown': None, ...} or 'value' in {'cap_rate': '0.065', 'collection_loss': '7100.00', 'egi': '330150.00', 'expense_breakdown': None, ...})

testcase.name: test_cost_approach
testcase.failure: tests/test_full_regression.py:359: in test_cost_approach assert "indicated_value" in data or "total_value" in data E AssertionError: assert ('indicated_value' in {'age_life_ratio': '0.2000', 'base_cost_per_sf': '350', 'depreciated_improvements': '16800000.00', 'external_obsolescence': '0.00', ...} or 'total_value' in {'age_life_ratio': '0.2000', 'base_cost_per_sf': '350', 'depreciated_improvements': '16800000.00', 'external_obsolescence': '0.00', ...})

testcase.name: test_leed_calculation
testcase.failure: tests/test_full_regression.py:393: in test_leed_calculation assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_breeam_calculation
testcase.failure: tests/test_full_regression.py:412: in test_breeam_calculation assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_scenario_properties

failure.message: AssertionError: assert (False or 'items' in {'properties': [{'cap_rate': 0.055, 'current_value': 435000000.0, 'id': '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', 'name': 'Downtown Office Tower', ...}, {'cap_rate': 0.065, 'current_value': 74770000.0, 'id': '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', 'name': 'Suburban Retail Center', ...}, {'cap_rate': 0.048, 'current_value': 301670000.0, 'id': '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', 'name': 'Industrial Distribution Hub', ...}]}) + where False = isinstance({'properties': [{'cap_rate': 0.055, 'current_value': 435000000.0, 'id': '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', 'name': 'Downtown Office Tower', ...}, {'cap_rate': 0.065, 'current_value': 74770000.0, 'id': '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', 'name': 'Suburban Retail Center', ...}, {'cap_rate': 0.048, 'current_value': 301670000.0, 'id': '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', 'name': 'Industrial Distribution Hub', ...}]}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_full_regression.py:463: in test_scenario_properties assert isinstance(data, list) or "items" in data E AssertionError: assert (False or 'items' in {'properties': [{'cap_rate': 0.055, 'current_value': 435000000.0, 'id': '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', 'name': 'Downtown Office Tower', ...}, {'cap_rate': 0.065, 'current_value': 74770000.0, 'id': '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', 'name': 'Suburban Retail Center', ...}, {'cap_rate': 0.048, 'current_value': 301670000.0, 'id': '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', 'name': 'Industrial Distribution Hub', ...}]}) E + where False = isinstance({'properties': [{'cap_rate': 0.055, 'current_value': 435000000.0, 'id': '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001', 'name': 'Downtown Office Tower', ...}, {'cap_rate': 0.065, 'current_value': 74770000.0, 'id': '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002', 'name': 'Suburban Retail Center', ...}, {'cap_rate': 0.048, 'current_value': 301670000.0, 'id': '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000003', 'name': 'Industrial Distribution Hub', ...}]}, list)

testcase.name: test_portfolio_dashboard

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('kpis' in {'alerts': [{'action_required': True, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T08:34:31.352483Z', 'id': 'stranded_warning', 'message': '1 assets at risk of stranding with total value $125.0M', ...}, {'action_required': False, 'created_at': '2026-02-17T08:34:31.352497Z', 'id': 'sector_concentration', 'message': 'Portfolio has high concentration in a single sector. Consider diversification.', ...}], 'avg_risk_score': '43.4', 'charts': {'geographic_distribution': {'chart_type': 'bar', 'config': {'valueLabel': 'Value ($M)'}, 'data': [{'name': 'New York', 'value': 435.0}, {'name': 'Dallas', 'value': 301.67}, {'name': 'San Francisco', 'value': 280.0}, {'name': 'Houston', 'value': 125.0}, {'name': 'Chicago', 'value': 74.77}], 'title': 'Geographic Distribution'}, 'property_values': {'chart_type': 'bar', 'config': {}, 'data': [{'name': 'Downtown Office', 'value': 435.0}, {'name': 'Suburban Retail', 'value': 74.77}, {'name': 'Industrial Dist', 'value': 301.67}, {'name': 'Luxury Multifam', 'value': 280.0}, {'name': 'Legacy Office P', 'value': 125.0}], 'title': 'Property Values ($M)'}, 'risk_distribution': {'chart_type': 'bar', 'config': {}, 'data': [{'fill': '#22c55e', 'name': 'Low (<30)', 'value': 1}, {'fill': '#f59e0b', 'name': 'Moderate (30-50)', 'value': 2}, {'fill': '#f97316', 'name': 'High (50-70)', 'value': 1}, {'fill': '#ef4444', 'name': 'Very High (70+)', 'value': 1}], 'title': 'Risk Distribution'}, 'sector_allocation': {'chart_type': 'pie', 'config': {}, 'data': [{'name': 'Office', 'value': 46.0359738252606}, {'name': 'Industrial', 'value': 24.79941468547565}, {'name': 'Multifamily', 'value': 23.0179869126303}, {'name': 'Retail', 'value': 6.146624576633455}], 'title': 'Sector Allocation'}, ...}, 'kpi_cards': [{'change': '8.81', 'change_period': 'from base', 'color': 'emerald', 'icon': 'DollarSign', ...}, {'change': None, 'change_period': None, 'color': 'blue', 'icon': 'Building2', ...}, {'change': None, 'change_period': None, 'color': 'emerald', 'icon': 'AlertTriangle', ...}, {'change': None, 'change_period': None, 'color': 'red', 'icon': 'TrendingDown', ...}, {'change': None, 'change_period': None, 'color': 'red', testcase.name: test_scheduled_report_lifecycle
testcase.failure: tests/test_full_regression.py:577: in test_scheduled_report_lifecycle assert create_resp.status_code == 200 E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
